name: 400 Followers + Announcement
description:
Well, 400 followers, it isn't as much as like 500 (to which I probably should've posted this but whatever, but man it's still so much from when I had started off with. From the bottom of my heart, I thank all of you for sticking with me, I am so glad to have a following as supportive as you guys and I hope that the number can continue going up.

Okay, now for the announcement, I've been thinking about remaking some of my older bots, some I want to simply update with new pictures, some I want to give completely new scenarios )as I looked back, now I personally would prefer to update these bots with these said plans but I feel like that wouldn't be a good idea, so maybe a remake might work better, what do you guys think? Should I remake the bots and which ones would you like to see me remake? Be sure to leave a comment.
creator: Ruekert
